rationale: The citing paper focuses on repeat churn in telecom using a mixture cure–competing risks model, while the cited paper studies permission-email opt-in/opt-out timing with a vine-copula framework, so the overlap appears thematic but not obviously methodological. The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference entry (no in-text citation context or descriptive reference text), which is too sparse to determine whether this is merely background or substantively used. Given this limited evidence, it cannot be safely dropped.
